game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Earn to Die:** Players control one of 8 vehicles in a 2D side-scrolling environment, automatically accelerating through zombie hordes, tapping the right side of the screen for a limited nitro boost and the left side to control vehicle pitch in the air. Each run begins with a full fuel tank and limited nitro, with the objective to cover maximum distance and reach checkpoints in the story mode. Colliding with zombies or terrain reduces vehicle health and momentum, and the run ends if fuel depletes or the vehicle is destroyed, earning cash based on distance and zombies killed. This cash is then spent on multi-tiered upgrades for engine, fuel, wheels, armor, and weapons like guns or spiked frames, directly improving vehicle performance and zombie-killing efficiency. Difficulty scales as zombie density and terrain complexity increase with distance, requiring continuous upgrades to progress through the cross-country journey.
game_info.description: Drive through a zombie apocalypse wasteland, covering maximum distance while destroying zombies. Your vehicle automatically accelerates with limited fuel and nitro. Survive by managing your resources, avoiding damage, and earning cash to upgrade your vehicle between runs. Reach checkpoints to progress through increasingly difficult terrain filled with more zombies and obstacles.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Up/Space: Activate nitro boost (limited supply)
Arrow Down: Brake/Reverse
Arrow Left/Right: Control vehicle pitch in air
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen after game over

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Movement and Survival Test. Tests that the vehicle can move forward, use nitro strategically, and survive for a reasonable distance without crashing immediately.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Drive forward while using nitro in short bursts to maintain speed. Adjust pitch when airborne to land smoothly. Avoid excessive braking to conserve fuel and maintain momentum through zombie hordes.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Vehicle should travel at least 500 meters, demonstrating basic movement, nitro usage, and collision handling. Test succeeds if the vehicle survives without critical errors and covers meaningful distance.

TEST_2.test_description: Win Condition Test. Tests the optimal strategy to reach the final checkpoint and complete the game by maximizing distance, managing resources effectively, and using upgrades strategically.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use nitro strategically to maintain momentum through dense zombie areas. Balance airborne pitch control for smooth landings. Purchase upgrades between runs prioritizing engine, fuel capacity, and armor to enable reaching the final 3000m checkpoint.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully reach the final checkpoint at 3000m by completing multiple runs, earning cash, purchasing upgrades, and demonstrating mastery of all game mechanics. Test succeeds when GAME_OVER_WIN is achieved.
